vuGetCodePage()

Purpose

Returns the current runtime code page value.

Parameters

  • None.

Return value

Returns the currently active numeric code page.

Notes

  • This reads the current in-memory runtime value.
  • Use vuSetCodePage() to change it.
  • The globals-oriented aliases are vuGlobalsGetCodePage() and vuGlobalsSetCodePage().
